gnomad.note: absent from gnomAD v4 across all populations

insilico.note: approximate; predictors strongly converge on damaging

mavedb_function.note: BRCA1 BRCT-domain saturation genome editing; within WT-like distribution, contradicting in-silico signal

literature.title: Accurate classification of BRCA1 variants with saturation genome editing.
literature.abstract: p.Asp1692Asn maps to a WT-like score in the BRCA1 saturation genome editing dataset, despite high computational deleteriousness scores from REVEL and AlphaMissense.

_ground_truth.note: Genuine in-silico vs functional disagreement; ClinVar consensus VUS pending additional family or case-control data
